name: Data Structures and Algorithms
description: Core concepts of data structures including arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, and graphs with analysis of algorithms.
outcomes: Implement fundamental data structures efficiently using C++
Analyze time and space complexity of computational algorithms
Solve algorithmic problems using optimal memory layouts

name: Discrete Mathematics
description: Mathematical structures that are fundamentally discrete rather than continuous, covering logic, sets, and graph theory.
outcomes: Apply mathematical logic to structural computer science issues
Utilize formal proofs for validating algorithmic properties

name: Computer Organization and Architecture
description: Internal operations of digital computers, instruction set architectures, memory hierarchies, and pipelining.
topics: Von Neumann Architecture and Bus Structures
outcomes: Understand low-level execution pipelines and hardware limits
Optimize software designs based on memory layouts and cache hits

name: Design and Analysis of Algorithms
description: Advanced algorithmic design paradigms including greedy algorithms, dynamic programming, and complexity theories.
outcomes: Evaluate complex computing dilemmas and apply proper design strategies
Prove algorithm optimality and handle optimization problems efficiently

name: Mobile Application Development
description: Comprehensive guide to building native Android applications using modern platform SDK layout architectures and tools.
topics: Android Studio Environment and SDK Layout
UI/UX Design with XML and Modern Layout Tools
Local SQLite/Room Databases and External API Consumption
outcomes: Build native mobile applications featuring background execution architecture
Integrate local persistent databases with external network API calls
